name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry's classic underarm tote bag, 😀 is now a popular vintage shop favorite. Many influencers are hunting for it, willing to pay thousands for a pre-owned piece. Adjustable strap, can be carried by hand or underarm, and with an extra chain, it becomes a crossbody bag. A truly versatile classic!
Size: 21/5/14cm
